tagline: A low-overhead fencing franchise backed by a predecessor unit showing $362K net income and a built-in call center that handles booking and follow-up for franchisees.
description_short: 76 Fence is a residential and commercial fencing franchise offering installation, staining, and repair under an owner-operator or manage-the-manager model. Investment starts under $200K for a single territory, with a predecessor unit showing $1.54M gross sales and $362K net income in 2024. The brand is supported by a national call center, proprietary CRM, and Rhino7 franchise development.
market_intelligence_insight: US fencing market valued at $9.8B in 2024, projected to reach $12.8B by 2033 at a 5.3% CAGR, driven by rising residential construction, security demand, and suburban expansion.
item_19_headline: Predecessor Chicago-area unit reported $1.54M gross sales and $362K net income for full-year 2024.
ongoing_support: dedicated call center,field support,CRM and POS technology,operations manual,marketing materials,national accounts program,annual conventions
